title: python-allowlist.toml
description: Per-file allowlist that exempts individual Python files from the itp-hooks Python-preference nudge (posttooluse-python-preference-nudge.ts). Each file must be allowed explicitly with a justification; there is no blanket/project-wide suppression. Discovered by walking up from an edited .py file toward the repo root; an entry's `path` is resolved relative to the directory containing this file.

schema.description: Optional informational pointer to this JSON Schema. Not enforced by the hook.

allow.description: The list of explicitly-allowed Python files.

path.description: Path to the allowed .py file, relative to the directory containing this allowlist file (absolute paths are also accepted). Matched exactly against the edited file's resolved absolute path.

reason.description: Required, non-empty justification for why Python is the right choice for this file (e.g. SOTA-native ML/data/quant lane, or existing convention). A blank/whitespace-only reason is treated by the hook as NOT allowed.

issue.description: Optional tracking issue (e.g. 'eon/mono#1234') — typically a migration-tracking or rationale issue.
